## 2025-03-08 美团 General Aptitude Test 【Project Management Intern】

![bangwu20250308194953](https://cdn.bangwu.top/img/202503082350366.webp)

General Aptitude Test大概分为四个部分，语言表达能力【类似语文口语选择题】、数学能力【一些数学规律和简单的数学题】、逻辑推理能力【根据情境推断选择合适的答案】、数据分析能力【根据图表来分析答案】

这个笔试比较简单，毕竟是General Aptitude Test，不是技术岗所以没考算法题，一开始在牛客考的有点吓人

> Lessons Learned

1. Need scratch paper for math — too many mental calculations this time
2. `同比增长`要理解清晰
3. Formal exam process: enable camera, screen recording, phone mini-program monitoring, sign integrity pledge

## 2025-03-09 拼多多 Algorithm Exam 【Server R&D Intern】

![bangwu20250309112526](https://cdn.bangwu.top/img/202503091125153.webp)

第一次做Algorithm Exam，Not well prepared — weak at algorithms, only know basics，Only solved the first easy problem out of four, as expected，Feel like algorithm problems require considering many edge cases — don't really understand

> Lessons Learned

1. Need a phone stand to film upper body and screen — first time encountering this
2. Can switch to local IDE for answers, easier to debug
3. Need more practice with ACM-style algorithm problems

## 2025-03-09 腾讯 Comprehensive Assessment 【Project Management Intern】

![bangwu20250309174057](https://cdn.bangwu.top/img/202503091741562.webp)

Questions about workplace and project conflict decisions, more like personality tests，Probably no standard answers

> Lessons Learned

None

## 2024-04-23 华为 Algorithm Exam 【General Software Development】

![huawei end](https://cdn.bangwu.top/img/168whx-48bangwu20250423194113.webp)

The algorithm problems were quite difficult，First problem: find minimum k numbers【算法忘了】，Second problem: binary tree variant，Third problem: shortest path，All too hard for me, submitted early 😂 Didn't expect to pass, still too weak

> Lessons Learned

None，Recently in a bad mood, not motivated for exams
